mapper.select: /** CmmtBannerDao.selectList_count */ select count(*) as cnt from cmmt_banner where

/** CmmtBannerDao.selectList_today */ select banner_id ,banner_nm ,system_id ,banner_type ,begin_dt ,end_dt ,target_url ,new_window ,animation ,text_html ,pc_image_file_id ,mobile_image_file_id ,image_alt_cn ,sort_order from cmmt_banner where enabled = true and system_id = #{systemId} and begin_dt <= now() and end_dt >= now() order by sort_order
